title: LowExposure
description: A post-processing shader that applies a low exposure effect to your game. (completely customizable!)
body:
# Low Exposure

Transform your Minecraft world with a moody, cinematic aesthetic inspired by underexposed photography.

## What it does

This shader mod applies real-time color grading to create that classic **underexposed look** - darker tones, enhanced contrast, and desaturated colors for a more dramatic and atmospheric visual experience.

The shader adjusts:
- **Brightness** - Subtle darkening for richer shadows
- **Contrast** - Boosted contrast for more dramatic lighting
- **Saturation** - Muted colors using proper perceptual luminance calculations

Perfect for players who want a more cinematic, moody atmosphere without the performance impact of complex lighting shaders.

## Features

- ⚡ Lightweight post-processing shader
- 🔧 Configurable settings for fine-tuning (down to the luminance perception value [RGB only])

## Requirements

- **NeoForge 1.21.1**
- **Veil 1.2.0** or higher (get the veil-bundled version if you don't want to install Veil)
- **Fzzy Config 0.6.0** or higher

## Installation

1. Install the required dependencies listed above
2. Download and place the mod file in your `mods` folder
3. Launch the game and enjoy the new atmospheric look!

-------------

> Best used with [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/TocuaDpt)
